189 F1C F1C_SELF_ACTIVITY (F1C) At Ease Doing Self-Initiated Activities CHAR 1 Psychosocial well-being: sense of initiative/invovlement - at ease doing self-initiated activities. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
190 F1D F1D_OWN_GOALS (F1D) Establishes Own Goals CHAR 1 Psychosocial well-being: sense of initiative/invovlement - establishes own goals. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
